synthesis.driver: Escalating Hormuz attacks push Brent up $2.60, but oversupply caps further gains.
synthesis.based_on: Commercial ship traffic through Strait of Hormuz falls back to near-record lows

takes.commercial ship traffic through strait o: Record-low traffic signals heightened risk, sustaining upward pressure on oil prices.
takes.iran war strait of hormuz: Iran war risks amplify Hormuz disruption, supporting higher oil prices.
takes.florida gas prices shoot up after tensio: Regional escalation lifts retail fuel costs, reflecting broader crude price pressures.
takes.container ship attacked in strait of hor: Ship attack underscores Hormuz vulnerability, adding to the war-risk premium.
takes.oil prices jump as shipping fears return: Shipping fears revive war premium, driving crude prices higher despite oversupply.
